jsonLd.title: Pantaloons is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Pantaloons! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Rajkot team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Pantaloons:
Pantaloons is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pantaloons!
